categories.label: Countries
categories.description: Well-known capitals, currencies, landmarks, flags, and geography basics.

questions.question: What is the capital of France?
questions.explanation: Paris is the capital and largest city of France.

questions.question: What is the capital of Japan?
questions.explanation: Tokyo is Japan's capital city.

questions.question: What is the capital of Australia?
questions.explanation: Australia's capital is Canberra, not Sydney.

questions.question: What is the capital of Canada?
questions.explanation: Ottawa is Canada's capital city.

questions.question: What is the capital of Brazil?
questions.explanation: Brasilia is the planned capital of Brazil.

questions.question: What is the capital of Italy?
questions.explanation: Rome is Italy's capital and home to the Colosseum.

questions.question: What is the capital of South Korea?
questions.explanation: Seoul is the capital and largest city of South Korea.

questions.question: What is the capital of Egypt?
questions.explanation: Cairo is Egypt's capital and largest city.

questions.question: What is the capital of Mexico?
questions.explanation: Mexico City is the capital of Mexico.

questions.question: What is the capital of India?
questions.explanation: New Delhi is India's capital.

questions.question: What is the capital of the United Kingdom?
questions.explanation: London is the capital of the UK.

questions.question: What is the capital of Spain?
questions.explanation: Madrid is Spain's capital city.

questions.question: What is the capital of Germany?
questions.explanation: Berlin is the capital of Germany.

questions.question: What is the capital of Thailand?
questions.explanation: Bangkok is Thailand's capital city.

questions.question: What is the capital of Argentina?
questions.explanation: Buenos Aires is Argentina's capital.

questions.question: What is the capital of Turkey?
questions.explanation: Turkey's capital is Ankara, not Istanbul.

questions.question: What is the capital of Kenya?
questions.explanation: Nairobi is the capital of Kenya.

questions.question: What is the capital of Greece?
questions.explanation: Athens is Greece's capital and one of Europe's oldest cities.

questions.question: What is the capital of China?
questions.explanation: Beijing is the capital of China.

questions.question: What is the capital of Indonesia?
questions.explanation: Jakarta is Indonesia's capital city.

questions.question: What currency is used in Japan?
questions.explanation: Japan uses the yen.

questions.question: What currency is used in the United Kingdom?
questions.explanation: The UK uses the pound sterling.

questions.question: What currency is used in the United States?
questions.explanation: The United States uses the dollar.

questions.question: What currency is used in South Korea?
questions.explanation: South Korea uses the won.

questions.question: On which continent is Egypt located?
questions.explanation: Egypt is in northeastern Africa.

questions.question: On which continent is Brazil located?
questions.explanation: Brazil is the largest country in South America.

questions.question: On which continent is India located?
questions.explanation: India is part of South Asia.

questions.question: Which country is home to the Eiffel Tower?
questions.explanation: The Eiffel Tower is in Paris, France.

questions.question: Which country is home to the Great Pyramid of Giza?
questions.explanation: The Great Pyramid of Giza is one of Egypt's most famous landmarks.

questions.question: Which country is home to the Taj Mahal?
questions.explanation: The Taj Mahal is located in Agra, India.

questions.question: Which country is home to Christ the Redeemer?
questions.explanation: Christ the Redeemer overlooks Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.

questions.question: Mount Fuji is in which country?
questions.explanation: Mount Fuji is Japan's most famous mountain.

questions.question: The Colosseum is in which country?
questions.explanation: The Colosseum is in Rome, Italy.

questions.question: Machu Picchu is in which country?
questions.explanation: Machu Picchu is one of Peru's best-known landmarks.

categories.label: Movies
categories.description: Big-name films, characters, actors, directors, and blockbuster franchises.

questions.question: Who directed Titanic?

acceptedAnswers: hogwarts school of witchcraft and wizardry

questions.question: Which movie franchise features Lightning McQueen?

questions.question: What number is Lightning McQueen best known for?
questions.explanation: Lightning McQueen races with the number 95.

questions.question: Which 2023 biopic centers on J. Robert Oppenheimer?
questions.explanation: Oppenheimer is Christopher Nolan's film about J. Robert Oppenheimer.

questions.question: Who directed Oppenheimer?
questions.explanation: Christopher Nolan directed Oppenheimer.

questions.question: Which movie franchise features the killer Ghostface?
questions.explanation: Ghostface is the masked killer in the Scream films.

questions.question: Which horror universe includes the doll Annabelle?
questions.explanation: Annabelle is one of the best-known characters in The Conjuring Universe.

questions.question: Which villain is the sea witch in The Little Mermaid?
questions.explanation: Ursula is the main villain of The Little Mermaid.

questions.question: In which Disney movie do characters sing A Whole New World?
questions.explanation: A Whole New World is one of Aladdin's signature songs.

questions.question: Which actor plays Deadpool in the live-action films?
questions.explanation: Ryan Reynolds is closely identified with Deadpool.

questions.question: Which movie franchise centers on Dominic Toretto and street racing?
questions.explanation: Dominic Toretto is the central character of the Fast & Furious series.

questions.question: Which actor played the Joker in Joker (2019)?
questions.explanation: Joaquin Phoenix won an Oscar for playing the Joker in Joker.

questions.question: In which movie does Katniss say I volunteer as tribute?
questions.explanation: Katniss says the line in the first Hunger Games film.

questions.question: Which actor played Thor in the Marvel Cinematic Universe?
questions.explanation: Chris Hemsworth plays Thor in the MCU.

questions.question: Which actress played Black Widow in the Marvel Cinematic Universe?
questions.explanation: Scarlett Johansson played Natasha Romanoff in the MCU.

questions.question: Which actor voiced Maui in Moana?
questions.explanation: Dwayne Johnson voiced Maui in Moana.

questions.question: Which Disney movie features the demigod Maui?
questions.explanation: Maui appears in Disney's Moana.

questions.question: Which movie musical features Elphaba and Glinda?
questions.explanation: Wicked centers on Elphaba and Glinda.

questions.question: Which actress played Elphaba in Wicked?
questions.explanation: Cynthia Erivo plays Elphaba in Wicked.

questions.question: Which singer-actress played Glinda in Wicked?
questions.explanation: Ariana Grande plays Glinda in Wicked.

questions.question: Which actor played Willy Wonka in Wonka?
questions.explanation: Timothee Chalamet starred as Willy Wonka in Wonka.

questions.question: Which action franchise follows an assassin named John Wick?
questions.explanation: John Wick is the title character of the John Wick films.

questions.question: Which Halloween movie features the Sanderson sisters?
questions.explanation: The Sanderson sisters appear in Hocus Pocus.

questions.question: Which teen comedy movie features Regina George?
questions.explanation: Regina George is one of Mean Girls's most famous characters.

questions.question: Which actress played Regina George in the 2004 film Mean Girls?
questions.explanation: Rachel McAdams played Regina George in Mean Girls.

questions.question: Which movie features Jack Skellington?
questions.explanation: Jack Skellington is the lead character of The Nightmare Before Christmas.

questions.question: Which actress played Rose in Titanic?
questions.explanation: Kate Winslet played Rose in Titanic.

questions.question: Which actor voiced Shrek?
questions.explanation: Mike Myers voiced Shrek.

questions.question: Which movie franchise features a bear named Paddington?
questions.explanation: Paddington is the title character of the Paddington films.

questions.question: Which actor played Willy Wonka in Charlie and the Chocolate Factory (2005)?
questions.explanation: Johnny Depp played Willy Wonka in Tim Burton's 2005 film.

questions.question: Which animated franchise features Gru and the Minions?
questions.explanation: Gru and the Minions are from the Despicable Me franchise.

questions.question: What is the name of the villain-turned-dad in Despicable Me?
questions.explanation: Gru is the central character of Despicable Me.

questions.question: Which movie centers on a magical board game that unleashes jungle chaos?
questions.explanation: Jumanji is the film about the dangerous magical board game.

questions.question: What is the name of the boy left home alone in Home Alone?
questions.explanation: Kevin McCallister is the child protagonist of Home Alone.

questions.question: Which Christmas movie features Kevin McCallister?
questions.explanation: Kevin McCallister is the main character of Home Alone.

questions.question: Which actress played Belle in the 2017 live-action Beauty and the Beast?
questions.explanation: Emma Watson played Belle in Disney's 2017 live-action remake.

questions.question: Which animated movie features Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde?
questions.explanation: Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde are the leads of Zootopia.

questions.question: Which character is Simba's father in The Lion King?
questions.explanation: Mufasa is Simba's father in The Lion King.

questions.question: Which movie features the quote Why so serious?
questions.explanation: The Joker says Why so serious? in The Dark Knight.

questions.question: Which actress played Wednesday Addams in the animated Addams Family movies and also starred in Beetlejuice Beetlejuice?
questions.explanation: Jenna Ortega is strongly associated with Wednesday and new gothic franchise roles.
